text:
plan submits a record to CMS. The PDE file includes all transactions covered by the Medicare prescription drug plan for both Prescription Drug Plans (PDPs) and Medicare Advantage Prescription Drug Plans (MA-PDs).

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
Service date
Product Service ID (NDC code)
Quantity dispensed
Days supply
Cost
Payment
Linkage variables:
Plan Contract ID, Plan Benefit Package ID for linkage to Plan Characteristics file
Product ID (NDC code) used by the CCW to link
